mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reviewer_nickname, u.avatar AS reviewer_avatar, p.title AS product_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reviewer_nickname, u.avatar AS reviewer_avatar, p.title AS product_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.reviewee_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname AS reviewer_nickname, u.avatar AS reviewer_avatar, p.title AS product_title FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.campus_service_id = #{campusServiceId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount FROM review WHERE deleted = 0 AND reviewee_id = #{userId}
